content.rendered:
Privacy Policies

We at Foaps, (“We”, “Us”, “Our”, “Company”), respect the privacy of everyone who visits this website, uses the desktop application, and/or uses our mobile applications (the website, desktop application, and the mobile application are collectively called, the “Foaps”). The Company has created Foaps and licensed the same use as part of its business operations. The services are rendered by the Company through Foaps.

We are highly committed to protecting your data and information and providing services to all the subscribers/users of the Foaps Platform. As a result, we would like to inform you regarding the way we would collect, process, store and use your personal data. We recommend you read this privacy policy (hereinafter referred to as “Policy”) so that you understand our approach to using your personal data. This Policy shall form part of the Terms of Services and any other additional Terms of Use issued by the Company concerning the use of the Services in the Foaps Platform.

By submitting your Personal Information (as defined hereinafter) to us, you (or anyone who accesses and uses the Foaps Platform shall be referred to as “You”, “Your” or “User” as the context may require) will be treated as having given their permission, wherever necessary and appropriate to our collection, use, and disclosure of Personal Information and accept this Policy along with any amendments or modifications as may be made from time to time. If you do not wish to provide any Personal Information, you are not entitled to use any of the Foaps Platforms or avail of any of the services provided in the Foaps Platform (“Services”). This Privacy Policy is subject to our general Terms of Services provided at the time of signing up. (“Terms”).

Personal information

During the registration process, the users are requested to enter their name, email address, and mobile. Users also need to select a unique username and password to access their account in the future. Your name and email address will be used to inform you regarding new services, releases, upcoming events, and changes in this Privacy Policy Statement. Foaps is not responsible for the Personal Information users elect to share within the application with others.

Payment information

Users are requested to enter their credit card details or other payment account information for services requiring payment. It will be solely used for processing payments, and your financial details will not be shared anywhere. Instead, your financial information will be stored in encrypted form for assisting your future payments alone.

Visitor details

We collect the IP address, browser type, browser language, referring URL, files accessed, errors generated, time zone, operating system, and other visitor details in our log files to analyze the trends, administer the website, track visitor’s movements and improve our website. In addition, we link this automatically collected data to other information we collect about you.

Sharing information

Your personal information is shared with our dealers and delivery partners to provide services to you. It is also shared with integration partners to maintain, improve and expand services. Your personal information will not be shared with any other third parties or misused.

Security

We execute appropriate administrative, technical, and organizational security measures to protect against unauthorized access, alteration, or disclosure of your personal information.

Links to other websites/External links

While using Foaps, you may be directed through links to third-party websites or services that are not operated or controlled by us. We are not responsible for the privacy practices and policies of these third-party websites. Therefore, you have to review the privacy policies of these third-party websites and act accordingly.

Contact us

If you have any questions or concerns regarding these privacy policies, please get in touch with us at hello@foaps.co We shall try to respond to all inquiries as soon as possible.
